dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Relentless Reserves
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 2% faster Stamina/Deflect/Soulweave regeneration for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stack: 10% faster Stamina/Performance/Soulweave regeneration.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sharpened Precision
dbEquipBonuses.description: When Action Points are less than 80%, your Accuracy is increased: +5.5% while outside of The Reched Edge, +7% while inside of The Reched Edge.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Movement Speed increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Accuracy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Accuracy. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Novice's Mercy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1.008 Outgoing Healing and Forte. Max 5 Stacks: 5.04% Outgoing Healing and Forte.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sentinel Reflexes
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use an encounter power, you have a 30% chance to gain 5.6% Awareness for 6 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Surging Empathy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1,320 Critical Severity and Accuracy. Max 5 stacks: 6,600 Critical Severity and Accuracy.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 3% of your health back.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Primal (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: If you are hit or healed for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 10% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Chilling Flow (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: While in The Biting Cold, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Chilling Flow. Each stack grants: General: +0.4% Power, DPS: +0.6% Critical Severity, Healer: +0.5% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank: +0.5% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Occult Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: +9% Critical Severity. -5% Defense.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Freezing Touch (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: +4% Power
